glosses.vi: nhu cầu; yêu cầu thông tin

translations.fr: La demande est forte en ce moment.
translations.vi: Hiện tại nhu cầu rất cao.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determinates the subject noun 'Nachfrage'.
Feminine noun; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate, indicating the current time frame.
Predicative adjective (positive degree); complement of the copula describing the extent of 'Nachfrage'.

translations.en: There is a lot of demand today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nhu cầu rất cao.
translations.nb: I dag er det stor etterspørsel.
translations.sv: Det är stor efterfrågan i dag.
translations.da: I dag er der stor efterspørgsel.
translations.ja: 今日は需要が高いです。

tokens.explanation: Expletive pronoun in an existential construction; fills subject position without concrete referent.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; existential 'geben' taking an object.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame of the clause.
Quantifier determiner; modifies the mass noun 'Nachfrage', indicating a large amount; uninflected here.
Feminine mass noun; direct object (accusative) of the existential verb 'gibt'.

sentences.target: Wegen hoher Nachfrage sind die T-Shirts ausverkauft.
sentences.reading: /ˈveːɡən ˈhoːɐ̯ ˈnaːxˌfʁaːɡə zɪnt diː tiːʃɪʁts ˈaʊsfɛʁˌkaʊft/

translations.de: Wegen hoher Nachfrage sind die T-Shirts ausverkauft.
translations.ipa: /ˈveːɡən ˈhoːɐ̯ ˈnaːxˌfʁaːɡə zɪnt diː tiːʃɪʁts ˈaʊsfɛʁˌkaʊft/
translations.en: Due to high demand, the T-shirts are sold out.
translations.es: Debido a la alta demanda, las camisetas están agotadas.
translations.fr: En raison de la forte demande, les T-shirts sont en rupture de stock.
translations.it: A causa dell'alta richiesta, le magliette sono esaurite.
translations.zh-Hans: 由于需求旺盛，T恤已售罄。
translations.yue: 因為需求好高，T恤已經賣晒。
translations.pt: Devido à alta procura, as camisetas estão esgotadas.
translations.he: בגלל ביקוש גבוה החולצות אזלו מהמלאי.
translations.vi: Do nhu cầu cao nên áo thun đã bán hết.
translations.nl: Door de hoge vraag zijn de T-shirts uitverkocht.
translations.hu: A nagy kereslet miatt a pólók elfogytak.
translations.hi: ज़्यादा मांग के कारण टी-शर्टें बिक गई हैं.
translations.pl: Z powodu dużego popytu koszulki są wyprzedane.
translations.el: Λόγω της υψηλής ζήτησης, τα μπλουζάκια έχουν εξαντληθεί.
translations.nb: På grunn av høy etterspørsel er T-skjortene utsolgt.
translations.id: Karena permintaan tinggi, kaos sudah habis.
translations.sv: På grund av hög efterfrågan är T-tröjorna slut.
translations.ro: Din cauza cererii mari, tricourile sunt epuizate.
translations.cs: Kvůli vysoké poptávce jsou trička vyprodaná.
translations.da: På grund af høj efterspørgsel er T-shirtsene udsolgt.
translations.fi: Kovan kysynnän vuoksi T-paidat ovat loppu.
translations.ja: 需要が高いため、Tシャツは売り切れです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting genitive; introduces a causal prepositional phrase.
Attributive adjective; feminine singular genitive (strong inflection) modifying 'Nachfrage' within the PP.
Feminine noun in genitive singular; complement of the preposition 'wegen'.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person plural present; links plural subject to the predicative adjective.
Definite article; plural nominative; determinates 'T-Shirts' as the subject.
Plural count noun; subject of the copular clause.
Predicative adjective (past participle used adjectivally); complement of the copula indicating state.

sentences.target: Vor Weihnachten steigt die Nachfrage überall.

translations.de: Vor Weihnachten steigt die Nachfrage überall.
translations.en: Before Christmas, demand goes up everywhere.
translations.es: Antes de Navidad, la demanda sube en todas partes.
translations.fr: Avant Noël, la demande augmente partout.
translations.it: Prima di Natale la domanda aumenta ovunque.
translations.zh-Hans: 圣诞节前，需求到处都在上涨。
translations.yue: 聖誕節前，周圍嘅需求都會上升。
translations.pt: Antes do Natal, a procura aumenta por toda parte.
translations.he: לפני חג המולד הביקוש עולה בכל מקום.
translations.tr: Noel öncesinde her yerde talep artıyor.
translations.vi: Trước Giáng Sinh, nhu cầu tăng khắp nơi.
translations.ar: قبل عيد الميلاد يرتفع الطلب في كل مكان.
translations.nl: Voor Kerst stijgt de vraag overal.
translations.hu: Karácsony előtt mindenhol nő a kereslet.
translations.hi: क्रिसमस से पहले हर जगह मांग बढ़ जाती है.
translations.pl: Przed Bożym Narodzeniem popyt rośnie wszędzie.
translations.el: Πριν τα Χριστούγεννα, η ζήτηση αυξάνεται παντού.
translations.id: Menjelang Natal, permintaan naik di mana-mana.
translations.ro: Înainte de Crăciun, cererea crește peste tot.
translations.da: Op til jul stiger efterspørgslen overalt.
translations.ja: クリスマス前はどこでも需要が高まります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Proper noun denoting the holiday; object of 'vor' (dative; occurs without article in this fixed temporal expression).
Intransitive main verb; 3rd person singular present; denotes increase.
Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determinates the subject noun.
Feminine noun; subject of the clause.
Adverb; clause-level modifier indicating ubiquity.

En raison de la forte demande, les T-shirts sont en rupture de stock.

Prima di Natale la domanda aumenta ovunque.
